options.name: -check_current_balanced_power_grid_em
options.description: {true false} <check power grid terminal via current EM rules>

options.name: -check_vsrc_placement_on_switched_net
options.description: {true false} <check source placement on switched net>

options.name: -cluster_via1_ports
options.description: <enable clustering equidistant vias on VIA1 layer >

options.name: -common_res_inst_pair_file_name
options.description: <string> <find common resistance for user defined inst pair>

options.name: -disable_em_split_ac_dc_rules
options.description: {true false} <disable separate handling of AC/DC rules>

options.name: -eiv_eval_layer_file
options.description: <list of cells to choose instance nodes on specified layers>

options.name: -eiv_eval_nodes
options.description: <choose instance nodes for eiv reporting: tap or port>

options.name: -eiv_eval_window
options.description: {both switching timing elapse} <eiv eval window: both, switching, timing or elapse>

options.name: -eiv_method
options.description: <eiv method list: worst, best, avg, bestavg, worstavg, bestslidingavg and worstslidingavg>

options.name: -em_rms_delta_T
options.description: <delta temperature for EM RMS currnet limit analysis>

options.name: -em_rms_delta_T_layer_list
options.description: <list of layer based delta temperature for EM RMS currnet limit analysis>

options.name: -em_temperature_layer_list
options.description: <list of layer based EM temperature for EM AVG current limit analysis>

options.name: -enable_package_battery_current_probing
options.description: {true false} <enable package BGA battery current probing>

options.name: -enable_vsrc_in_gif
options.description: enable vsrc display in generated gifs <true|false>

options.name: -enlarge_vsrc_in_vuvc
options.description: <plot larger vsrc representations in vu and vc GIF plots: true | false>

options.name: -era_check_wires_for_generated_current_regions
options.description: {true false} <generate unplaced current regions only in area where actual net wires are present>

options.name: -era_current_distribution
options.description: {placed unplaced all none} <distribute current into instances placed | unplaced | all | none>

options.name: -era_current_distribution_factor_for_placed
options.description: <float> <fraction of block area to be considered for area based power distribution>

options.name: -era_current_distribution_layer
options.description: <string> <layer for distributing unplaced current in early mode>

options.name: -era_current_distribution_nets
options.description: <distribute current for unplaced instances by total die area on specified nets only>

options.name: -era_current_distribution_unplaced_area
options.description: {instance diearea} <distribute current for unplaced instances by total die area or actual instance area>

options.name: -era_insert_virtual_followpin_for_io
options.description: {true false} <draw follow pin on core IO>

options.name: -era_insert_virtual_followpins
options.description: {standard extended none} <insert virtual followpins in early mode standard | extended | none>

options.name: -era_insert_virtual_via_on_layers
options.description: <string> <insert vitual via on layers in early mode {{<bottom_layer> <top_layer>}+} >

options.name: -era_instance_dynamic_current_file
options.description: <string> <user specified instance dynamic pwl current file>

options.name: -era_lef_layermap
options.description: <layer map file to generate port view>

options.name: -era_power_gate_file
options.description: <power gate file for power gateed design>

options.name: -era_skip_virtual_via_by_type
options.description: {whatif def all none} <skip virtual vias selectively whatif | def | all | none>

options.name: -era_techlib_generation
options.description: <skip technology PGV generation in ERA mode: true | false>

options.name: -gds_purpose
options.description: {flipChip fullChip metalFill} <gds purpose: flipChip | fullChip | metalFill>

options.name: -generate_combined_ivd_gif
options.description: <generate a combined ivd gif for all the nets specified in the domain>

options.name: -generate_instance_effr_report
options.description: <file contains list of instance names for layered based effr drop report>

options.name: -generate_instance_ir_report
options.description: <file contains list of instance names for layered based IR drop report>

options.name: -generate_instance_pin_ir_report
options.description: <string> <file contains list of instance names for instance pin IR drop report>

options.name: -generate_package_pin_current_voltage
options.description: {true false} <generate package pin current/voltage file: true | false>

options.name: -gif_iv_threshold
options.description: <iv threshold for combined ivd gif for all the nets specified in the domain>

options.name: -gif_new_color_scale
options.description: <use new color scale in GIF plots: true | false>

options.name: -gif_zoom_topcell_diearea
options.description: <set area of gif to top cell die>

options.name: -honor_negative_static_current
options.description: {true false} <enable to load & honor negative static current>

options.name: -hpgv_block_lefs
options.description: list of hierarchical block lef files

options.name: -lowest_layer_for_em_check
options.description: <layers below which EM plots are not generated>

options.name: -mcp_model_mapping
options.description: {{<mcp model name1> <die DEF name1>} {<mcp model name2> <die DEF name2>}...}

options.name: -method
options.description: {static dynamic era_static era_dynamic} <analysis method: static | dynamic | era_static | era_dynamic>

options.name: -package_trace_connectivity
options.description: {true false} <trace connectivity of package model: true | false>

options.name: -probe_instance_tap_waveforms
options.description: {true false} probe instance tap node waveforms

options.name: -probe_package_interface_ports
options.description: {true false} <probing interface ports in hier pacakge model>

options.name: -process_bulk_pins_for_body_bias
options.description: {true false} <process bulk pins for body bias>

options.name: -promote_pin_shapes_only
options.description: promote only pin shapes for filler|decap|{filler decap}

options.name: -rdl_orientation
options.description: <orientation: N S W E FN FS FW FE>

options.name: -reff_domain_report_format
options.description: < format for instance reff domain report: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | >

options.name: -reff_eval_nodes
options.description: <choose instance nodes for reff reporting: tap or port>

options.name: -reff_pin_report_layer
options.description: < layer selection for instance reff report: all | top | bottom | >

options.name: -reff_pin_report_method
options.description: < methods for instance reff report: worst | best | >

options.name: -report_instances_missing_current_data
options.description: {true false} report instances missing current data

options.name: -report_layer_based_ir_average
options.description: {true false} <report average IR drop value in layer based IR drop report and log file>

options.name: -report_layers_above_pin_for_instance_ir
options.description: {true false} <report nodes above pin layers in instance ir report>

options.name: -rlrp_cell_report_layer
options.description: < layer selection file path for instance rlrp report >

options.name: -rlrp_eval_nodes
options.description: <choose instance nodes for rlrp reporting: tap or port>

options.name: -rlrp_pin_report_layer
options.description: < layer selection for instance rlrp report: all | top | bottom | >

options.name: -rlrp_pin_report_method
options.description: {worst best eiv_worst eiv_best eiv_worst_window eiv_best_window} < methods for instance rlrp report: worst | best | eiv_best | eiv_worst | eiv_worst_window | eiv_best_window >

options.name: -seb_table
options.description: set the name of SEB table

options.name: -seb_temperature
options.description: temperature used to update MTF with respect to that at the ambient temperature

options.name: -switchbit_file_for_eiv_calculation
options.description: <string> <switch-bit file which is used for eiv calculation>

options.name: -unconnected_die_pkg_pins
options.description: {ignore error edit} <ignore, error out or start MCP Editor to edit unconnected pins between package model and die: ignore | error | edit>

options.name: -use_rms_delta_t
options.description: whether or not use rms deltaT for seb and thermal-aware EM

options.name: -xp_cpu_per_job_power
options.description: <specify the number of cpu per power analysis job in Voltus-XP>

options.name: -xp_cpu_per_job_simulation
options.description: <specify the number of cpu per simulation job in Voltus-XP>

options.name: -xp_host_allocation_method
options.description: {on_demand at_startup} <Specify the method for allocating hosts in Voltus-XP>

options.name: -xp_purge
options.description: <specify how Voltus-XP delete the internal run data after the run>

options.name: -xp_reuse_extraction_directory
options.description: <Reuse extraction data from the specified state directory for Voltus-XP>

options.name: -xp_simulation_cpu_timeout
options.description: <Specify the time (in seconds) XP waited to acquire the requested number of cpus needed for rail simulation stage in Voltus-XP. Valid value must be >= 0.>

options.name: -xp_simulation_min_cpu
options.description: <Specify the minimum number of cpus needed for rail simulation stage in Voltus-XP. Valid value must be > 0.>
